design_philosophy.core_loop: Explore a richly interactive medieval fantasy world, engage in real-time party-based combat, solve environmental puzzles through object manipulation, uncover moral conspiracies through dialogue-tree conversations
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Moral agency vs. systemic corruption—the Avatar must navigate deceptions and conspiracies while maintaining virtue in a world where even authority figures are compromised
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Be a legendary paragon hero who can freely interact with and reshape the world, lead a diverse fellowship through genuine moral quandaries, and uncover hidden truths through player-driven investigation
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Ultima VII rejects tile-grid movement abstraction in favor of continuous spatial interaction; every object in the world is potentially interactive (draggable, usable, stackable). It enforces mouse-driven interaction over keyboard commands, treating the UI as integral to world immersion. Real-time unpaused combat demands strategic party positioning. Dialogue trees gate information reveal by actual in-world events, preventing sequence-breaking via external knowledge. The game privileges emergent problem-solving and environmental storytelling over combat, treating exploration and item manipulation as primary mechanics equal to or above combat.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Party AI behavior can be customized per character (aggressive vs. defensive postures); manual combat targeting available for Avatar. Real-time combat with pausable inventory and dialogue allows player to manage pacing. No difficulty settings documented; challenge emerges from party composition, AI limitations, and combat positioning rather than tuning.

progression.upgrade_system: Party member recruitment and equipment management; spell acquisition through discovery and training; no documented character leveling system in traditional sense
progression.unlock_mechanism: Dialogue tree keywords gated by plot events (cannot access dialogue options or triggers before they are narratively introduced); environmental puzzles require object stacking and manipulation to access new areas
replayability_hooks: Multiple party composition paths and AI configurations affect combat outcomes
Environmental puzzles may have multiple solutions via different object stacking approaches
Moral choices in NPC interactions (though limited by single-player narrative constraints)
Emergent interactions with highly interactive world simulation

world_building_techniques: Environmental storytelling through interactive object placement and NPC schedules
Dialogue trees that reveal lore contextually tied to plot progression
Player-driven investigation (no quest markers; information must be gathered through NPC conversation)
Interactive world simulation (baking bread, forging weapons, painting, changing baby swaddling) grounds fantasy setting in believable domestic detail
Multi-layered maps with stacking objects create visual narrative complexity
Keyword-based dialogue (inherited from earlier Ultimas) tied to learned plot elements

faction_indicators: Moral virtue vs. corruption as central theme
NPC allegiances and conspiracies discoverable through dialogue
danger_signals: Monster infestations requiring investigation and elimination
Deceptions in authority figures requiring player verification
environmental_storytelling: Interactive domestic objects (swaddling, bread-baking) signal functioning society
Monster presence and placement indicates threat zones
NPC positioning and schedules reveal faction activity and social structures
Item placement in containers conveys character intentions and wealth

sources_used: Wikipedia - Ultima VII: The Black Gate (gameplay, game system, world building, narrative delivery)
